title: Remotes, Tracking, Fetch, Pull, and Push · Graph Retrieval
summary: Synchronize with a shared repository while separating network transfer, local integration, authentication, and authorization decisions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish remote names, URLs, remote-tracking references, local branches, upstreams, and push destinations.
Fetch explicit remotes and refspecs, inspect updates, and compare local work before integrating.
Explain pull as fetch plus configured integration and select merge, rebase, or fast-forward-only deliberately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Remote Reference Model · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — Local main is 4 commits ahead and one behind origin/main; fetch updates only remote-tracking refs. Compare ranges, choose integration policy, and name exact source/destination before push. Competency probe: Distinguish remote names, URLs, remote-tracking references, local branches, upstreams, and push destinations.

Which action demonstrates Remote Reference Model without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish remote names, urls, remote-tracking references, local branches, upstreams, and push destinations.

content.text: Local main is 4 commits ahead and one behind origin/main; fetch updates only remote-tracking refs. Compare ranges, choose integration policy, and name exact source/destination before push. Competency probe: Distinguish remote names, URLs, remote-tracking references, local branches, upstreams, and push destinations.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Remote Reference Model evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Remote Reference Model assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Local main is 5 commits ahead and one behind origin/main; fetch updates only remote-tracking refs. Compare ranges, choose integration policy, and name exact source/destination before push. Competency probe: Separate HTTPS or SSH transport, credentials, host trust, authorization, signing, and repository policy.

stimulus.title: Credential Transport case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Local main is 5 commits ahead and one behind origin/main; fetch updates only remote-tracking refs. Compare ranges, choose integration policy, and name exact source/destination before push. Competency probe: Separate HTTPS or SSH transport, credentials, host trust, authorization, signing, and repository policy.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A successful SSH connection proves permission to push every branch.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate HTTPS or SSH transport, credentials, host trust, authorization, signing, and repository policy. Artifact under review: a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Credential Transport, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Credential Transport record says a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Credential Transport without its stated preconditions, omit the a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Credential Transport for a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Credential Transport: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Local main is 6 commits ahead and one behind origin/main; fetch updates only remote-tracking refs. Compare ranges, choose integration policy, and name exact source/destination before push. Competency probe: Separate HTTPS or SSH transport, credentials, host trust, authorization, signing, and repository policy.
steps.why: Retrieving Credential Transport through the concrete a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate HTTPS or SSH transport, credentials, host trust, authorization, signing, and repository policy.
